content: MSP outage alert: AWS showing credible multi-service issue signals; monitor hosted apps, APIs, and dependent tooling.

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Credible signals indicate an active or very recent AWS multi-service operational issue. Independent monitoring shows AWS reporting issues, and public user reports mention 500 responses or empty JSON from AWS-hosted APIs.

fields.text:
*Impact*
Potential degradation across AWS-hosted apps, APIs, and dependent MSP tooling or customer services.

text.text:
*Response*
• Check customer-facing AWS workloads, integrations, and automation for elevated errors, latency, or failed jobs before escalating internally.
• Pause nonessential changes and watch AWS Health plus your own telemetry; prepare client comms if tenant-facing impact is confirmed.
